t.t-if: ngsign_config['use_v2'] and (o.ngsign_status == 'TTN Signed' or (o.ngsign_ttn_qr_code and o.ngsign_ttn_reference))

div.t-attf-style: position: fixed; top: {{ngsign_config['qr_y']}}mm; left: {{ngsign_config['qr_x']}}mm; width: {{ngsign_config['qr_size']}}mm; height: {{ngsign_config['qr_size']}}mm; z-index: 1000;
position: fixed; top: {{ngsign_config['label_y']}}mm; left: {{ngsign_config['label_x']}}mm; width: {{ngsign_config['label_width']}}mm; z-index: 1000; font-size: 10px;
